organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Hospitalization expenses of person donating an organ during the course of organ transplant will also be payable subject to the limit of overall Sum Insured of the Insured Person or floater Sum Insured of family. For the Donor, no payment will be made towards Pre and Post Hospitalization expenses.

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalisation, if Medically Necessary and at Reasonable and Customary Charges up to a maximum aggregate sub- limit of 20% (Twenty percent) of the Sum Insured.

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims 
shall be payable in Indian currency.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote:
Cashless facility means a facility extended by Us to the insured where the payments, of the costs of 
treatment undergone by the insured

geographic_coverage.source_quote:
All medical treatment for the purpose of this insurance will have to be taken in India only and all claims 
shall be payable in Indian currency.

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote:
The deductible shall be applicable on a per event basis in case of “Top Up” policy and on per year 
basis in case of “Super Top Up” policies.
